title: Quick link to Camera from mobile app
excerpt:
Please add the Camera app to bottom row of Icons on mobile app along with HOME-MY WORK- NOTIFICATIONS-MORE 
We use mobile app when we are on site visits an staff find it cumbersome to access the their mobile camera using…

posts.author: canarini (RC)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please add the Camera app to bottom row of Icons on mobile app along with HOME-MY WORK- NOTIFICATIONS-MORE

We use mobile app when we are on site visits an staff find it cumbersome to access the their mobile camera using the Boards and Update feature in Monday. This would be an very welcome feature update to the mobile up.
